news.title: Nifty hits 23,000, led by HDFC Bank as a top contributor.
news.summary: Nifty hits 23,000, led by HDFC Bank as a top contributor.

news.title:
HDFC Bank shares fell 24% from a June '23 high of 1,020 post-merger, facing investor concerns.
RSI shows oversold conditions; recovery may depend on strong performance and stable developments.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank shares fell 24% from a June '23 high of 1,020 post-merger, facing investor concerns.
RSI shows oversold conditions; recovery may depend on strong performance and stable developments.

news.title:
HDFC Bank appoints external law firms to review chairman's abrupt exit.
The move aims to bolster investor confidence in India's largest private lender.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank appoints external law firms to review chairman's abrupt exit.
The move aims to bolster investor confidence in India's largest private lender.

news.title:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.
news.summary:
Nomura warns Indian banks' margins to face pressure as deposit growth lags credit growth, impacting profitability and NIM recovery.
Nomura highlights ICICI, Axis as top picks; maintains 'Buy' on HDFC, Kotak, SBI, and others with revised target prices cut by 2-24%.

news.title: HDFC Bank shares rose 3% to ₹754.75 as it reviews ex-chairman's resignation.
news.summary: HDFC Bank shares rose 3% to ₹754.75 as it reviews ex-chairman's resignation.

news.title:
HDFC Bank faces scrutiny post-chairman's resignation over 'values and ethics,' raising corporate governance concerns.
Coal India plans SECL IPO, Wipro expands in South Korea, and Bosch forms JV with Tata AutoComp for EV solutions.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank faces scrutiny post-chairman's resignation over 'values and ethics,' raising corporate governance concerns.
Coal India plans SECL IPO, Wipro expands in South Korea, and Bosch forms JV with Tata AutoComp for EV solutions.

news.title:
HDFC Bank's stock rose 3.2%, hitting Rs 768 intraday on BSE, breaking a 4-day losing streak.
The stock had declined 12% over the prior four sessions before Tuesday's recovery.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank's stock rose 3.2%, hitting Rs 768 intraday on BSE, breaking a 4-day losing streak.
The stock had declined 12% over the prior four sessions before Tuesday's recovery.

news.title:
HDFC Bank, NBCC, Indigo, Balkrishna Industries, and GR Infraprojects are key stocks to watch.
GR Infraprojects secures ₹2,440.9 crore NHAI order; Balkrishna Industries to issue ₹750 crore NCDs.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank, NBCC, Indigo, Balkrishna Industries, and GR Infraprojects are key stocks to watch.
GR Infraprojects secures ₹2,440.9 crore NHAI order; Balkrishna Industries to issue ₹750 crore NCDs.

news.title:
RBI may scrutinize HDFC Bank's CEO Sashidhar Jagdishan's third-term application.
Atanu Chakraborty's exit as Part-Time Chairman raises regulatory concerns for HDFC Bank.
news.summary:
RBI may scrutinize HDFC Bank's CEO Sashidhar Jagdishan's third-term application.
Atanu Chakraborty's exit as Part-Time Chairman raises regulatory concerns for HDFC Bank.

news.title:
SEBI Chair Pandey highlights governance norms in HDFC Bank case, emphasizing transparency and formal processes amid Chairman Chakraborty's resignation.
Pandey confirms no changes in SEBI's approach to F&O trading, with measures like tighter limits and monitoring in place, awaiting further data analysis.
news.summary:
SEBI Chair Pandey highlights governance norms in HDFC Bank case, emphasizing transparency and formal processes amid Chairman Chakraborty's resignation.
Pandey confirms no changes in SEBI's approach to F&O trading, with measures like tighter limits and monitoring in place, awaiting further data analysis.

news.title:
HSBC retains buy on HDFC Bank but cuts target to 990 from 1070.
Chairman's resignation linked to opinion differences, not governance concerns.
news.summary:
HSBC retains buy on HDFC Bank but cuts target to 990 from 1070.
Chairman's resignation linked to opinion differences, not governance concerns.

news.title: HDFC Bank CEO Jagdishan highlights concerns about creating uncertainties by not specifying issues.
news.summary: HDFC Bank CEO Jagdishan highlights concerns about creating uncertainties by not specifying issues.

news.title: HDFC Bank dismisses top leaders as AT1 bonds come under scrutiny.
news.summary: HDFC Bank dismisses top leaders as AT1 bonds come under scrutiny.

news.title:
Geopolitical tensions surged as US-Iran conflict intensified; crude oil hit $119/barrel.
HDFC Bank's Chairman resigned citing ethical concerns; Nifty saw its steepest fall since April 2025.
news.summary:
Geopolitical tensions surged as US-Iran conflict intensified; crude oil hit $119/barrel.
HDFC Bank's Chairman resigned citing ethical concerns; Nifty saw its steepest fall since April 2025.

news.title:
HDFC Bank led a ₹1 tn market cap erosion among top 5 firms; Sensex dipped 0.04%.
Reliance Industries gained ₹45.9k cr, while Bharti Airtel, SBI, LIC, Infosys also rose.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank led a ₹1 tn market cap erosion among top 5 firms; Sensex dipped 0.04%.
Reliance Industries gained ₹45.9k cr, while Bharti Airtel, SBI, LIC, Infosys also rose.

news.title:
HDFC Bank fired 3 senior officials over client onboarding gaps at its DIFC branch, following regulatory action by DFSA.
Chairman Atanu Chakraborty's resignation citing ethical concerns adds scrutiny, impacting the bank's governance and reputation.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank fired 3 senior officials over client onboarding gaps at its DIFC branch, following regulatory action by DFSA.
Chairman Atanu Chakraborty's resignation citing ethical concerns adds scrutiny, impacting the bank's governance and reputation.

news.title:
Rupee hit a record low of ₹93.49/USD amid volatility; Sensex rose 326 pts, Nifty gained 112 pts.
HDFC Bank fired senior executives for mis-selling; IOCL raised industrial diesel rates by ₹22/L.
news.summary:
Rupee hit a record low of ₹93.49/USD amid volatility; Sensex rose 326 pts, Nifty gained 112 pts.
HDFC Bank fired senior executives for mis-selling; IOCL raised industrial diesel rates by ₹22/L.

news.title:
Retail loan GNPAs in FY26 are being curtailed by major banks.
RBI flagged risky practices, causing bad loans in retail portfolios.
news.summary:
Retail loan GNPAs in FY26 are being curtailed by major banks.
RBI flagged risky practices, causing bad loans in retail portfolios.

news.title:
HDFC Bank dismisses its group head of branch banking.
Two other executives have also been dismissed by HDFC Bank.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank dismisses its group head of branch banking.
Two other executives have also been dismissed by HDFC Bank.

news.title:
HDFC Bank fired Sampath Kumar and two senior executives for alleged mis-selling of Credit Suisse AT1 bonds.
Executives misled NRIs to transfer FCNR deposits, selling perpetual bonds as fixed maturity; DFSA barred new clients in Dubai.
news.summary:
HDFC Bank fired Sampath Kumar and two senior executives for alleged mis-selling of Credit Suisse AT1 bonds.
Executives misled NRIs to transfer FCNR deposits, selling perpetual bonds as fixed maturity; DFSA barred new clients in Dubai.
